steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0911.022457.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Move merchant-acquirer down to reduce their priority, Move merchant-acquirer up to increase their priority
